hero.title: Good Deeds Day:
hero.subtitle: Ready to change the world? Every small act can create a huge impact. Here are some cool ways you can spread light today!

tips.title: Smile at Someone You Don't Know
tips.description: A smile is contagious! When you smile at someone in the hallway or on the street, you instantly brighten their day. That's your secret superpower.
tips.imageAlt: Child smiling at a friend at school

tips.title: Help a Friend with Homework
tips.description: Good at math? Great at English? Share your knowledge and help someone who's struggling. Nothing feels better than seeing someone else succeed!

tips.title: Give a Genuine Compliment
tips.description: See a nice shirt? Did someone say something smart in class? Don't keep it to yourself - just say it! One kind word can light up someone's entire week.
tips.imageAlt: Group of friends laughing and complimenting each other

tips.title: Pick Up Trash from the Ground
tips.description: A good deed is also for our environment. See a wrapper on the grass at school? Pick it up and throw it in the nearest bin. Planet Earth thanks you!
tips.imageAlt: Children collecting litter in a park

cta.title: Ready to Spread Kindness?
cta.quote: Every small act is part of a big change
cta.successAlert: Well done! The world already looks better because of you!

share.title: Got Your Own Idea? 💡
share.subtitle: Thought of a creative way to do good? We really want to hear about it!
share.placeholder: Tell us about your good deed...
share.successAlert: What an amazing idea! Thanks for sharing with us!

footer.copyright: © 2024 Good Deeds Day - For a generation that changes the world
